# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template for an S3 bucket that stores user-uploaded files and application backups. Allow full read/write access for our application IAM role. Keep the configuration simple - we'll add versioning and lifecycle rules in the next iteration.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

Resources:
  MyS3Bucket:
    Type: 'AWS::S3::Bucket'
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub "my-s3-bucket-${AWS::AccountId}"

Outputs:
  S3BucketName:
    Value: !Ref MyS3Bucket
    Description: The name of the created S3 bucket

Policies:
  MyS3Policy:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::Policy'
    Properties:
      PolicyName: my-s3-policy
      Roles:
        - !Sub "arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:role/my-application-role"
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          -
            Sid: AllowS3Access
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - s3:GetObject
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:DeleteObject
            Resource: !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${MyS3Bucket}"
